crime.value: Theft and replacement of precious stones from the Jew's Breastplate
crime.quote: That night I made my way into the museum, and I replaced four of the stones.

victim.value: The museum and its collection of the urim and thummim breastplate
victim.quote: the greatest danger to which, since the destruction of the Temple, the urim and thummim has been exposed

closed_world.value: The museum with night security rounds by Simpson
closed_world.quote: When Simpson came round I always heard his footsteps, and concealed myself in the mummy-case.

culprit_and_motive.value: Professor Andreas, motivated by love for his daughter and desire to save a man from criminal disgrace
culprit_and_motive.quote: My own happiness, my daughter's future, the hopes of this man's regeneration, all depend upon your decision.

resolution.value: Confession and agreement to repair the damage through expert goldsmith work
resolution.quote: Tomorrow the loose settings shall be tightened by an expert goldsmith

investigator.value: An unnamed narrator and his friend who discover the truth
investigator.quote: Here is my hand, Professor Andreas, and I can only hope that under such difficult circumstances

red_herring.value: Initial assumption that Joyce-Armstrong Fragment is an elaborate practical joke designed to misdirect from true explanation
red_herring.quote: idea that the extraordinary narrative...is an elaborate practical joke...has now been abandoned

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence (Joyce-Armstrong Fragment, railway reports) presented to reader simultaneously with investigator's access
clue_fairness.quote: The Joyce-Armstrong Fragment was found in the field which is called Lower Haycock

social_world.value: Industrial hierarchy of collieries, ironworks, and railway systems with abandoned vs. active operations creating access patterns
social_world.quote: country is dotted with ironworks and collieries. Of these, some are being worked and some have been abandoned

reveal_mechanic.value: Systematic elimination through railway infrastructure analysis and physical evidence correlation
reveal_mechanic.quote: These four side lines may be eliminated from our inquiry, for...the rails nearest to the main line have been taken up

media_and_audience.value: Public perception shifts from dismissing supernatural narrative as hoax to forced acceptance of extraordinary danger
media_and_audience.quote: forcing itself upon the general intelligence that they are true, and that we must readjust our ideas

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle tales of terror and mystery
